person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
John MacDonald, Lord of the Isles 
Birth: 1320 Finlaggan Castle, Island of Islay, Argyll, Scotland
Death: 1386 Ardtornish Castle, Lochaline, Argyll, Scotland
Managed by: James Fred Patin, Jr.
Son of Angus Og MacDonald of the Isles and Áine Ó Catháin
Husband of Margaret Stewart, Princess of Scots
Ex-husband of Eupheme MacRuaridh (Macruari)
Father of Ranald MacDonald, 1st Chief of Clan MacDonald; Godfrey MacDonald, Lord of Uist and Garmoran; John MacDonald; Marjorie MacDonald; Mary Macdonald and 7 others
Brother of Mary MacDonald and Alexander MacDonald
Half brother of Iain "Fraoch" MacDonald

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles於1320年4月出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德時，他的父親Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles48歲，母親Agnes O Cathan41歲。他於1337年6月4日與Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1376年住在蘇格蘭阿吉爾可納達爾。他於1356年登記服兵役。他去世於1386年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles于1320年4月出生在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德时，他的父亲Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles48岁，母亲Agnes O Cathan41岁。他于1337年6月4日与Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1376年住在苏格兰阿吉爾可納達爾。他于1356年登记服兵役。他去世于1386年在苏格兰阿吉爾莫文享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles was born in April 1320, in Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, was 48 and his mother, Agnes O Cathan, was 41. He married Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran on 4 June 1337, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland in 1376. He registered for military service in 1356. He died in 1386, in Morven, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 66, and was buried in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles est né en avril 1320, à Islay Island, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Agnes O Cathan, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran le 4 juin 1337, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Knapdale, Argyll, Écosse en 1376. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1356. Il est décédé en 1386, à Morven, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles im April 1320 in Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles 48 und seine Mutter Agnes O Cathan 41. Er hat am 4. Juni 1337 in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1376 hat er in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland gelebt. Er hat sich 1356 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Morven, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles è nato il nel aprile 1320 nel Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Agnes O Cathan, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran il 4 giugno 1337, nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland nel 1376. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1356. Morì nel 1386, nel Morven, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Carrach MacDonald of the Islesが1320年4月にスコットランドアルグイルイスレイ イスランドで生まれた時，父Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Islesは48歳，母Agnes O Cathanは41歳であった。1337年6月4日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルでEuphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1376年にはスコットランドアルグイルナプダルに住んでいた。彼は1356年に兵役登録をした。彼は1386年にスコットランドアルグイルモーベンで66歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ アイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles(이)가 1320년 4월 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이 이슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes O Cathan(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1337년 6월 4일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1376년도에 스컷랜드 아그이 냅데일에서 살았다. 그는 1356년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1386년 스컷랜드 아그이 모르븐에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles nasceu em abril de 1320, em Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Agnes O Cathan, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran em 4 de junho de 1337, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland em 1376. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1356. Ele faleceu em 1386, em Morven, Argyll, Scotland, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles родился апрель 1320 г. в местности ислеи исланд, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes O Cathan, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran 4 июня 1337 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности напдеил, аргилл, Шотландия в 1376 году. В 1356 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1386 г. в местности морвен, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles nació en abril de 1320, en Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Agnes O Cathan, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Euphemia Amie MacRuaridh Heiress of Garmoran el 4 de junio de 1337, en Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland en 1376. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1356. Murió en 1386, en Morven, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
